title: CreateMvpSkillRequest
description: Schema for the create_mvp skill (CCW-MVP20). Autonomously generates and appends a new MVP entry to the Clockwork MVP chain.

trigger.description: What initiated this MVP creation request.

trigger_ref.description: Path to the triggering artifact (e.g. parity_matrix or defect report). May be null.

mvp_name.description: Proposed MVP name. If omitted, the skill infers a name from trigger and domain.

domain.description: Domain or area of the MVP (e.g. 'routing', 'testing', 'documentation').

scope.description: List of skill IDs or capability gap labels this MVP will address.

dry_run.description: If true, return the draft MVP entry without writing to disk.
